title: B@rakah #1294
definition:
Berachah = "blessing"

 n pr m
 1) a Benjamite, one of David's warriors

 n pr loc
 2) a valley in the wilderness near Tekoa where Jehoshaphat and his
    people assembled to bless Jehovah after the overthrow of the hosts
    of the Moabites
nasbUsage:
